name: mogause
description: mogause — autonomous AI agents on Stellar that discover and pay for premium API tools using x402 HTTP 402 micropayments

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../agent && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:init && docker compose --env-file docker.env build
scripts.docker:up: npm run docker:init && docker compose --env-file docker.env up -d --build
scripts.docker:down: npm run docker:init && docker compose --env-file docker.env down
